reasoning: No evidence suggests that regular US troops have entered Yemen in 2025, despite the US launching airstrikes in April. A reported agreement in May 2025 has suspended Houthi firing at US ships. There are approximately 7 weeks left in the year, and analysts agree that conventional US ground deployments to Yemen are highly unlikely. The historical base rate for sending non-special operations forces to Yemen is nearly zero. Market sentiment (around 6% in October) aligns with a low probability of this occurring before December 31.
